Storage._comment: Mahsulot rasmlari saqlanadigan fizik papka. Bo'sh bo'lsa wwwroot/uploads/products ishlatiladi (productionda named Docker volume'ga mount qilinadi).

SuperAdmin._comment: ConsoleSegment is the opaque URL segment for /api/_sa/{segment}/* — set it via env (SuperAdmin__ConsoleSegment) to a long random string in production. Leaving it empty makes the console unreachable.
SuperAdmin._seedComment: First-launch bootstrap reads Username/Password (or SUPERADMIN_USERNAME/SUPERADMIN_PASSWORD env vars). Idempotent — remove after the user exists.
